params.agentTokenId: Agent's ALIAS token ID to hire

params.agentBps: Basis points (0-10000) to send to agent
params.clientBps: Basis points (0-10000) to return to client

approveAndRelease(uint256).notice: Client approves work and releases payment

cancelEscrow(uint256).notice: Client cancels before agent starts — full refund

claimExpired(uint256).notice: Client reclaims funds after deadline + grace period

createEscrow(uint256,uint256,string,uint.notice: Create and fund an escrow for a job

disputeJob(uint256,string).notice: Either party can raise a dispute

resolveDispute(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Arbiter resolves a dispute by splitting funds

startJob(uint256).notice: Agent accepts and starts the job
